_metadata.audit: AI-0003-Audit v1.0 — validated against official NIM docs 2026-07-20
_metadata.description: Open WebUI model parameters for Nemotron Ultra 550B via NVIDIA Cloud NIM

removed_v010: repetition_penalty: 1.1 (unsupported by NIM — use frequency_penalty instead)
corrected_v010: temperature: 0.6 → 1.0 (official NVIDIA docs use 1.0 in all examples)
max_tokens: 2048 → 4096 default (reasoning traces need more tokens)

model._note_context: Default context: 256K tokens. 1M requires VLLM_ALLOW_LONG_MAX_MODEL_LEN=1 server-side (BM-10: verify Cloud NIM limit)

inference_defaults._note: Base parameters sent for all requests. Profile overrides applied on top.
inference_defaults._evidence_temperature: All official NVIDIA NIM examples use temperature=1.0. Source: docs.api.nvidia.com
inference_defaults._evidence_top_p: NVIDIA recommends top_p=0.95 with reasoning ON. Source: official API reference

general._description: Default profile for general queries. Thinking OFF to conserve tokens.

reasoning._description: Full reasoning mode for complex problems. Thinking ON.
reasoning._warning: 3-10x token cost vs general. Monitor REQ-AI-0011.

medium_effort._description: Partial reasoning mode. Recommended as starting point for reasoning tasks.
medium_effort._note: Requires Pipeline to inject extra_body.chat_template_kwargs.medium_effort=true. System prompt alone not sufficient for medium_effort.

creative._description: Creative writing and brainstorming. Higher diversity.

code._description: Coding assistance. Thinking ON for accuracy.
code._note: Requires Pipeline to inject force_nonempty_content=true per NVIDIA docs for coding agents.
code._evidence: Official NVIDIA docs: 'For coding agents add force_nonempty_content: true'

rag._description: RAG-augmented retrieval. Thinking OFF for speed; context injection handles complexity.

agent._description: Agentic workflow profile. Tool calling enabled. Thinking ON.
agent._note: For tool calls + reasoning: Pipeline MUST inject chat_template_kwargs per SGLang requirement.

context_budget._note: Total context = system_prompt + history + rag + output. Must be < context_length_default_confirmed (262144). All values in tokens.
context_budget._formula: total_safe_budget = system_prompt_budget + history_budget + rag_budget + thinking_trace_budget + output_reserved

unsupported_parameters_do_not_use: repetition_penalty (silently ignored by NIM — use frequency_penalty)
n (NIM only supports n=1; n>1 returns 400)
